query:
SELECT ql.id as leadId, ql.name, ql.phone, ql.createdAt as leadCreated
FROM quote_leads ql
WHERE ql.phone = '+13029816191'
ORDER BY ql.id DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QXWpcJKwPBoGqNG.f679bd03aa5d --database CAeRhAUjAZoEuxNGm5QbPr --execute SELECT ql.id as leadId, ql.name, ql.phone, ql.createdAt as leadCreated
FROM quote_leads ql
WHERE ql.phone = '+13029816191'
ORDER BY ql.id DESC
LIMIT 5;
